overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from a game engine resembling GTA V, depicting a foggy residential street. The camera moves forward on foot past a modern house and along a stone wall as vehicles occasionally pass by on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street in front of modern house

events.description: red sports car approaches from down the street and passes by the camera

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the wet residential street as the sports car passes by

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving down the street and passing the camera

entered.detail: contemporary two-story house with illuminated address number 3441
wooden garage door attached to the modern house
tall street lamp casting light through the fog
tall green hedge running along the property line

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a foggy residential street at night in front of a modern house numbered 3441. A red sports car approaches from down the street and passes by the camera as it moves forward along the wet asphalt, with street lights cutting through the mist.

events.description: camera passes the speed limit 25 sign and continues along the curving road

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past regulatory signage and alongside a stone wall

entered.detail: white regulatory sign with black text reading SPEED LIMIT 25
grey stone retaining wall along the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the residential street, the camera passes a speed limit 25 sign on the left. A stone wall begins to line the left side of the road while the hedge continues on the right, creating a corridor-like feel as the road curves gently.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-covered residential street with stone walls

events.description: environment becomes more enclosed as camera moves under dense tree canopy with overhanging branches
passing a dark colored sedan parked on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking through the overhanging tree branches along the walled section of road

notable_agents.action: dark sedan parked on the roadside partially under tree cover

entered.detail: dense tree branches creating a canopy overhead and partially obscuring the view

segments.scene_description: The street becomes more enclosed as the camera moves under a canopy of overhanging tree branches. The lighting grows darker in this sheltered section, and the camera passes a dark sedan parked on the right side before continuing along the stone-walled road toward distant lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a foggy residential street at night that gradually becomes more enclosed and shadowed. It begins in front of a modern house numbered 3441, where a red sports car passes by on the wet asphalt as street lights cut through the mist. As the camera advances, the open road narrows into a corridor-like path marked by a speed limit 25 sign and a stone wall that begins to line the left side. The scene then shifts into a more sheltered environment as the camera moves under a canopy of overhanging tree branches, causing the lighting to grow darker. Finally, the camera passes a dark sedan parked on the right before continuing along the stone-walled road toward distant lights.
